name: GOLFTEC Geneva
address: 1492 S Randall Rd Suite H, Geneva, IL 60134
about: GOLFTEC is a premium golf training facility that uses advanced technology to offer structured improvement programs. Their lessons are built on data, incorporating OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide expert feedback. The service is comprehensive, including club fitting and practice memberships to guide players toward long-term progress. GOLFTEC is designed for golfers seeking a systematic approach to improvement, from beginners to experienced players looking to refine their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using high-tech swing analysis
Comprehensive improvement process from lessons to club fitting
Certified PGA coaches with a team-based approach
High-tech training environment with launch monitors and video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for lessons and practice. However, club rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food and drink services, so it's unclear if outside items are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes on a simulator can vary, but it typically takes about 2-3 hours depending on the software and player pace.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve.
